findings.summary: Update with only linkType change (no url provided) skips URL re-validation — by design per documented prospective-only posture

test_sufficiency_summary: Sufficient. 13 new tests cover all acceptance criteria across create and update paths, external passthrough, moderator-role publication filtering, all-children-filtered-but-parent-visible edge case, and LessThanOrEqual operator type pin. Full API suite 310 passed, 2 skipped, 0 failed. Typecheck and lint clean.
documentation_accuracy_summary: Accurate. docs/features/navigation.md field-rules paragraph correctly removes the stale no-leading-slash note and documents the implemented constraint with prospective-only posture.
